name: assignment-planner-embedded-server
//: Minimal manifest whose ONLY job is to declare type:module so Node loads the .js files as ESM when the packaged Electron app spawns this folder out of resources/server/. Dependencies are listed in the ROOT package.json; electron/scripts/copy-server-deps.js populates src/server/node_modules/ at build time. Do not add a `dependencies` block here.
